overview.description: The iShares iBonds 1-5 Year Corporate Ladder ETF (LDRC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is a fund-of-funds, tracking an equally-weighted index that staggers maturities across a portfolio of underlying iShares iBonds Corporate ETF, all maturing within six years. Each underlying fund comprises USD-denominated, investment-grade corporate bonds maturing annually. LDRC was launched on Nov 7, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: BlackRock iBonds 1-5 Year Corporate Ladder Index
